title: Country Landmarks Food Premium Poster AI
sourceTitle: Country Landmarks Food Premium Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium clean poster showcasing iconic Italy landmarks and traditional dishes. Subject: Colosseum, Venice canal bridge, Florence dome, and Tuscan hillside silhouette and fresh pasta, margherita pizza slice, tiramisu, basil, olive oil, and espresso cup represent Italy through a refined cultural travel-and-food composition. Scene: Elegant poster environment with architectural silhouettes, plated food details, subtle cultural motifs, and clean negative space. Composition: Fixed balanced vertical poster layout: landmarks form the upper or background architectural rhythm, traditional dishes anchor the foreground, and the composition stays clean, elegant, and not crowded. Signature Elements: Preserved country landmarks food premium poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium travel-and-food editorial poster with polished illustration/photographic hybrid detail, refined cultural cues, sophisticated spacing, and commercial-quality finish. Color Palette: Restrained palette inspired by Italy, with natural food colors, soft architectural neutrals, and elegant accent tones. Lighting: Soft premium editorial light, gentle shadows under dishes, readable landmark silhouettes, and clear cultural detail. Typography: TASTE OF ITALY appears as the clean destination title with minimal supporting text only if needed. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
